name: accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient invoice processing causes late payments. We streamline manual invoice tracking instead of manual invoice processing.
problem_solved: Inefficient invoice processing leading to late payments.
